message:
test(watchdog): add 25 integration tests for resize watchdog → degradation pipeline (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Tests cover the full scheduler→watchdog→degradation ladder chain:
watchdog severity classification (Healthy/Warning/Critical/SafeMode),
degradation tier mapping (FullQuality→QualityReduced→CorrectnessGuarded→
EmergencyCompatibility), four end-to-end scenarios bridging both systems,
phase transition and supersession effects on stall detection, and
degradation metadata correctness (triggers, recovery rules, serde roundtrip).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
